SHOPIFY & WORDPRESS WEBSITE DESIGNER

A website can look polished
and still fail to do its job.

The product is there, but visitors don't understand why it matters. The services are listed, but the value gets lost. The business has grown, but the website still feels like an older version of it.

I'm Dorcas Charlotte. I redesign Shopify and WordPress websites by finding the gaps between what a business offers and what customers actually experience.

I look at the structure, the message, and the decisions behind every page, then rebuild the experience so visitors know where they are, why they should care, and what to do next.

ABOUT

Design is the easy part. Finding why a visitor leaves is the actual job.

Before I touch a website, I look at what is not working.

A website is rarely just a collection of pages. Behind every page is a question: why are people leaving, why aren't they understanding the offer, why doesn't the website feel as strong as the business behind it?

My role is to find those missing pieces. Sometimes that means redesigning an outdated website. Sometimes it means creating a landing page with a clearer direction. Sometimes it means rebuilding the way information is presented so customers can move through the website naturally.

THE SAME PRODUCT, TWO DIRECTIONS

Good design is a conversation, not a first draft.

The Snoopy Magic Mixer landing page went through a full palette pivot before it shipped — a moody navy-and-lime concept first, then a warm, kid-safe cream-and-orange direction once we tested how parents actually shop for children's products. Both versions are shown here on purpose.

SHIPPED VERSION
SERVICES

Two platforms, deliberately.

I go deep on two platforms rather than wide across many — Shopify for anything ecommerce, WordPress for everything else. That's where I can promise you the most considered result, not just the fastest one.

Shopify

Store design and redesign, product and collection set up, and conversion-focused landing pages — built in the Theme Editor and a page builder, fast to load and mobile-first from the first pixel.

STORE DESIGN & REDESIGNSTORE CUSTOMIZATION LANDING PAGESCOLLECTION SET UP PRODUCT LISTINGS

WordPress

Business, portfolio, service-based, and personal websites, plus WooCommerce stores — designed and redesigned in Elementor, with the content structure and trust signals a visitor notices in the first five seconds.

SELECTED WORK

What each project actually needed.

Four live projects — the business situation behind each one, the decisions made, and what shipped.

AFTER — LIVE
SHOPIFY · WEBSITE REDESIGN · OUTDOOR & ADVENTURE

Quikpod — Shopify Website Redesign

GOALAn established brand with an existing store wanted a redesign — the current site no longer reflected the quality of the brand or its products.
CHALLENGENot a new brand or product launch, but improving an existing experience: a clearer structure, stronger visual hierarchy, and a more engaging way to present the products, without losing the brand identity already in place.
APPROACHRedesigned the site from the ground up in Shopify with a page builder — reworking layout, page structure, and product presentation, with clearer sections and a more intuitive customer journey.
RESULTA more modern, professional online presence with a stronger foundation for guiding customers through the buying journey. The client came back afterward for landing page work on new marketing campaigns.
VIEW LIVE SITE →
↻ RETURNING CLIENT — SECOND PROJECT SHOPIFY · PAGE BUILDER LANDING PAGE · EDUCATION

Quikpod — STEM Magic Mixer Landing Page

GOALAfter the redesign above, the same client returned for a dedicated landing page for their STEM Magic Mixer product, to support upcoming Google Ads and social media campaigns.
CHALLENGECommunicate the product's educational value clearly to parents — the hands-on experiments and learning benefits — while still matching Quikpod's premium brand feel.
APPROACHDesigned a new landing page from scratch with a page builder, structured around the STEM experience with a clear storytelling flow, and laid out separately for desktop and mobile with campaign traffic and clear calls-to-action in mind.
RESULTA dedicated, campaign-ready page that clearly communicates the product's educational value for visitors arriving from marketing campaigns.
VIEW LIVE PAGE →
SHOPIFY · WEBSITE REDESIGN · KIDS PRODUCT

Snoopy Magic Mixer — Website Redesign

GOALAn existing website that no longer matched the quality of the product needed to be modernized — improving usability and creating a more professional experience for visitors.
CHALLENGETransforming an outdated site into a modern, engaging experience, while improving how visitors understand the product and move through the site.
APPROACHRedesigned the layout and sections with a focus on user experience, on-page SEO, and conversion-focused structure — refining the visual presentation and content structure throughout.
RESULTA refreshed digital presence with a clearer structure and improved user experience, giving the product a stronger foundation for attracting and engaging customers.
VIEW LIVE SITE →
WORDPRESS · WEBSITE REDESIGN · HEALTHCARE

UR Cared Medical Clinic — WordPress Website Redesign

GOALThe clinic already had a strong reputation, but its existing site — which the client had started redesigning himself — didn't fully reflect the quality of care and services on offer.
CHALLENGETurning that into a clearer, more professional experience, so visitors could quickly understand the clinic's services and treatment options and feel confident in the quality of care.
APPROACHRedesigned the homepage with new sections for a clearer storytelling flow, designed service pages from scratch, improved typography, imagery, spacing, and visual hierarchy, optimized on-page SEO, and integrated Google Reviews to surface real patient feedback.
RESULTA clearer, more professional site where visitors understand the clinic's services more easily, with trust elements that help build confidence before they reach out.
VIEW LIVE SITE →

HOW A PROJECT RUNS

From first message to launch day, here's exactly what to expect.

No guesswork about where your project stands, and no disappearing after the site goes live.

01 / DISCOVER

Understand the business

A conversation about your goals, your customer, and what the current site is actually getting wrong — before anything gets designed.

02 / STRUCTURE

Map the page

Every section is placed to move a visitor toward one action, with the reasoning behind each decision shared as we go.

03 / BUILD

Design in-platform

Built directly in Shopify's Theme Editor, a page builder, or Elementor — responsive from the first pixel, with progress you can see, not just take my word for.

04 / LAUNCH & SUPPORT

Hand over & stay on

Tested across devices, then a recorded walkthrough of your new site so your team can make simple edits — and I stay reachable for support after launch, not just until the invoice is paid.

FAQ

Before you scroll away.

Do you redesign existing websites or only build new ones?

+
Most projects start with a website that already exists but no longer represents the business properly. I redesign the structure, experience, and presentation to make the website clearer and more effective.

How do you approach a new project?

+
I start by understanding the business, customers, and goals before designing. The layout, content flow, and visual decisions come from what the website needs to achieve.

What type of websites do you design?

+
I specialize in Shopify and WordPress projects — including ecommerce stores, landing pages, service websites, and website redesigns.

Why only Shopify and WordPress?

+
Because depth matters. I focus on the platforms I work with most so I can create better solutions instead of spreading across every tool.

What do you need before starting?

+
I need to understand your business, your audience, and what you want customers to do on the website. The clearer the goal, the stronger the design direction.

How involved will I be during the project?

+
You stay involved at key stages while I handle the design process, structure, and problem-solving.

Do you provide support after launch?

+
Yes. I make sure everything is properly handed over and can assist with updates or improvements when needed.
